The Proposal: -
Department of Finance, Government Circular No. Post-0617 / Q. No.20 / Apuq, dated 29.6.2017
As per the guidelines, all posts in the Water Supply and Sanitation Department (itself) were reviewed. Sadar

As per the review, out of a total of 186 sanctioned posts in the existing structure in the respective cadre for the department, 32 posts have been cancelled and a total of 154 regular posts in the revised structure for the higher divisional have been filled up.
The approval of the committee and the finance department has been received. Accordingly, the revised diagram of this section is under reference.
The Government at No. 3 has issued by decision. According to the revised diagram, the division
Work-wise restructuring of the posts of Assistant Room Officer and Clerk-Typographer was under consideration.

As per the revised diagram, the Water Supply and Sanitation Department (SWAYAM) has auxiliary rooms in the office.
The details of the executive-wise restructuring of the posts of officers and clerks-typicians are given in the accompanying "Statement-A."
has been shown.
The said orders shall come into force on the date of this Government decision.
